Custom Filename Format

Example: Example.png

📖
Mix any of these special values into your folders and filenames:
PROTIP: Use / to create subfolders (eg. #{format}/#{name})
#{name} Example #{frame} Frame 1 #{section} Section 1 #{scale} 1x #{width} 100 #{height} 100 #{suffix} _example #{format} PNG #{date}
